response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior software developer with strong full-stack and distributed-systems background, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with deep STL, multi-threading, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) expertise. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (2014-2015, ~6 months) with no evidence of recent C++ work, message brokers in C++, MQTT/industrial protocols, or SDL/IEC 62443 experience. Primary stack is JS/TypeScript/DLang, which does not align with the core requirement.
strengths: 12+ years of software engineering experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong testing/TDD discipline, mentoring, and architectural mindset
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and wave-field-synthesis project
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL production experience; primary languages are TS/DLang
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT in IoT context) or message-broker C++ systems

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering experience and architectural skills
